title: MK-Viral-Assembly: a Nextflow pipeline for viral consensus genome assembly
description: MK-Viral-Assembly is a reproducible Nextflow pipeline for reference-based viral consensus genome assembly from paired-end Illumina short reads. It performs read quality control, trimming, reference mapping, variant calling, consensus generation, consensus QC, optional taxonomic screening, optional host-read depletion, optional Nextclade lineage/genotype assignment, optional BLAST species confirmation, MultiQC reporting, and per-virus static HTML dashboard generation.

creators.name: Nascimento, Jean Phellipe Marques do
creators.affiliation: Laboratório Central de Saúde Pública de Alagoas - LACEN-AL
